code: import axios from'axios';const ROOM_BOOKING_ENDPOINTS=['/api/room_bookings','https://calebtonny.alwaysdata.net/api/room_bookings'];const FOOD_ORDER_ENDPOINTS=['/api/food_orders','https://calebtonny.alwaysdata.net/api/food_orders'];const postCheckoutData=async(endpoints,payload)=>{let lastError=null;for(const endpoint of endpoints){try{return await axios.post(endpoint,payload,{timeout:10000,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}});}catch(error){lastError=error;}}throw lastError;};export const submitRoomBooking=payload=>postCheckoutData(ROOM_BOOKING_ENDPOINTS,payload);export const submitFoodOrder=payload=>postCheckoutData(FOOD_ORDER_ENDPOINTS,payload);
